CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit.log_activity(p_entity_type character varying, p_entity_id integer, p_action character varying, p_actor character varying, p_details jsonb DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb)
 RETURNS void
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO audit.activity_log(entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details)
    VALUES (p_entity_type, p_entity_id, p_action, p_actor, p_details);
END;
$function$

procedures.rawDefinition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION audit.trg_transaction_audit()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
AS $function$
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO audit.activity_log(entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details)
    VALUES ('transaction', NEW.id,
        CASE WHEN TG_OP = 'INSERT' THEN 'created' ELSE 'updated' END,
        'trigger',
        jsonb_build_object('amount', NEW.amount, 'status', NEW.status, 'type', NEW.trans_type));
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$
